languages.text: "Эоганн, заставь его говорить правду. Методы мне безразличны".
"Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, заставь его говорить правду. Методы мне безразличны".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."
"Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."
"Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

languages.text: «Eogunn, haga que confiese la verdad. No me importan los métodos».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, haga que confiese la verdad. No me importan los métodos».

languages.text: “伊奥贡，我不管你用什么方法，让他说出实话。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，我不管你用什么方法，让他说出实话。”

languages.text: « Eogunn, faites-lui avouer la vérité. La méthode m'importe peu. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, faites-lui avouer la vérité. La méthode m'importe peu. »

languages.text: "Eogunn, ona gerçeği söylet. Nasıl yaptığın umurumda değil."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, ona gerçeği söylet. Nasıl yaptığın umurumda değil."

languages.text: 「エオガン、こいつに真実を吐かせろ。手段は問わない」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: 「エオガン、こいつに真実を吐かせろ。手段は問わない」

languages.text: "Eogunn, er soll die Wahrheit sagen. Seine Methoden interessieren mich nicht."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, make him tell the truth. I do not care about the methods."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, er soll die Wahrheit sagen. Seine Methoden interessieren mich nicht."
